title: Hiring Store Manager at Nippon Paint Store

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Nippon Paint Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!
